title: justicia minima
intro: Justicia minima, also known as the dwarf justicia, is a perennial herb native to tropical and subtropical regions, commonly found in India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Justicia minima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and provide relief from allergic reactions. The herbal preparations of Justicia minima often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications for skin conditions.
